entries.content:
Shatadal Sundar Sinha
FULL-STACK DEVELOPER • REACT.JS • NEXT.JS • ANGULAR • TYPESCRIPT •
NODE.JS
Email: shatadal17@gmail.com Phone: +91 70636 44658, +91 93824 68250 Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Full-Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building high-performance web applications across SaaS,
EdTech, and PropTech domains. Specialises in React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript on the front end, with additional
experience in Angular for component-driven UI development. Hands-on backend experience in Node.js, EJS
templating, and MongoDB. Proven track record in leading product development, integrating payment gateways,
designing REST APIs, and leveraging AI-assisted workflows consistently delivering clean, scalable solutions in
cross-functional teams.
WORK EXPERIENCE
JavaScript / React.js Developer 	Aug 2024 – Present
Webskitters Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
WebSkitters Academy – Student CRM Portal (In-house Product Front-End Lead)
Led front-end development from scratch, owning architecture and delivery across the full product lifecycle.
Built a scalable component system using Next.js, TypeScript, and Material UI actively serving hundreds of
students and admins.
Converted Figma wireframes into pixel-perfect, fully responsive pages with zero design debt.
Collaborated with back-end engineers on REST API integration, defining consistent data-flow and error-
handling patterns.
Integrated Razorpay, Cashfree, and Instamojo payment gateways for real-time fee collection with automated
confirmation workflows.
Achieved sub-2s LCP on key pages, directly improving user retention metrics.
Qpulse AI-Powered Resume Builder (Client Project USA)
Built an AI-driven resume builder and admin dashboard using Next.js and TypeScript with multiple AI model
backends.
Developed personalised career roadmap features and a real-time AI chatbot for end-to-end interactive
experience.
Assisted in lightweight backend tasks built and consumed Node.js REST APIs for data persistence and user
session management.
Leveraged AI coding assistants (Claude AI, Amazon Q, GLM AI) to accelerate feature delivery and streamline
code reviews.

Front-End Developer 	Jun 2023 – Aug
2024
Ebrotech Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
Tenant Management System
Designed and built the full UI for a web and mobile rent management app tenant records, rent tracking, and
landlord dashboards using React.js and Ant Design.
Integrated MongoDB-backed REST APIs for real-time data sync; maintained 99% uptime through thorough
end-to-end testing.
Visitor Management Platform
Built a type-safe visitor scheduling system with React.js and TypeScript; strict typing and validation reduced
runtime bugs by ~40%.
Contributed to lightweight backend routes using Node.js and EJS for server-side rendered admin views.
Entra Office App
Built a feature-rich office management application covering meeting room bookings, visitor tracking, staff
management, and expense reporting.
Worked on select Angular-based modules for internal dashboard views, gaining hands-on experience with
Angular components and services.
Front-End Developer 	Jul 2022 – May
2023
Brenolabs Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
Doctor Appointment System: Delivered a responsive doctor availability and booking platform using React.js,
Bootstrap, and Tailwind CSS.
School Management System: Contributed to a centralised school operations platform using HTML5, CSS3,
and JavaScript, with Node.js + MongoDB powering the backend.
Front-End Developer Intern 	Sep 2021 – Feb
2022
Brenolabs Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
Built the front-end of a full-featured e-commerce platform - product listings, shopping cart, authentication, and
payment integration using React.js, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap.
Gained initial exposure to Node.js/Express backend patterns and MongoDB data modelling during the project.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Front-End 	React.js, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3
Back-End 	Node.js, Express.js, EJS, REST API Design & Integration
Database 	MongoDB, Mongoose
State Management 	Redux, Context API, React Query
UI Libraries 	Material UI (MUI), Ant Design, Tailwind CSS, SCSS/SASS, Bootstrap
Payment Gateways 	Razorpay, Cashfree, Instamojo
Tools & Workflow 	Git/GitHub, VS Code, Figma, Performance Optimisation, Agile / Scrum
AI Dev Tools 	Claude AI, Amazon Q, GLM AI, Antigravity AI
